Heads up: pull requests are maintainer-led. Small fixes (typos, doc corrections, a
broken config) are welcome. For anything larger, please open an issue first.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/validate.sh` and it passes
- [ ] No API keys or secrets are included
- [ ] Changes are consistent with the existing style
- [ ] For a larger change, I opened an issue first to align
